name: Hunted by a Milf Catgirl
description:
"What if you were a little mouse demi-human chased by a hot catgirl mom...?"

(Scenario: Medieval fantasy. You're a mouse demi-human who entered inside a house to search for food. Little did you know how dangerous doing that would be, as you were invading the house of a catgirl mom of five kittens)

P.S: Depending on what model you're using, the bot might be inconsistent, like describing demi-humans as having paws, whiskers, muzzle etc. even if they don't have that (in this universe). LLMs are just stupid sometimes. There's not much I can do :p
creator: smtacid2
